title: Docker Compose Multi-Container Orchestration
recommendation: Use compose depends_on rules to control container startup orders and check service healthiness. Affected files: docker-compose.yml.

title: Dockerfile / Container deployment recipe
recommendation: Use multi-stage builds to reduce image size and run containers as non-root users for security. Affected files: enterprise/__init__.py.

title: SQLAlchemy Declarative Database Schema Model
recommendation: Ensure columns with high search volumes have indexes (index=True) and declare proper relationships. Affected files: enterprise/integrations/models.py, enterprise/integrations/types.py.

title: Environment variable retrieval configuration
recommendation: Centralize all env var access in a settings configuration file and validate with Pydantic. Affected files: enterprise/enterprise_local/convert_to_env.py.

title: Python Backend Application Source File
recommendation: Adhere to PEP 8 style guidelines and include function docstrings and type hints. Affected files: enterprise/__init__.py.
